    C

    CDisRunning() - Method in interface RestaurantGame.Customer
    Returns whether the customer's patience countdown timer is currently active.
    CDisRunning() - Method in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
    Returns whether the customer's countdown is currently running.
    CDisRunning() - Method in class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
    Returns whether the patience timer is currently active.
    checkScore(Ticket) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Using ticket, calculates the score for that ticket based off how quickly and how accurately it was fulfilled.
    Cheese - Class in RestaurantGame
     
    Cheese() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Cheese
    Constructor that creates a default Cheese topping with the preset price and name.
    Cheese(double, String) - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Cheese
    Constructor that creates an Cheese topping with a specified price and name.
    CheeseTest() - Method in class Unit_Tests.ToppingTest
     
    clearBasket() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Basket
    Removes all items from the basket and resets the size.
    clearBasket() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Clears the basket by calling clearBasket() on basket.
    clearOven() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Oven
    Removes all items from the oven and resets the size.
    clearOven() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Calls clearOven() on oven.

    createCircle(Label, Color) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a Circle with a black Stroke, filled with color, and with a Tooltip of the text from Label cqu0l
    createRectangle(Label, Color) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a Rectangle with a black Stroke, filled with color, and with a Tooltip of the text from Label cqu0l
    createTriangle(Label, Color) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a Polygon that is a triangle with a black Stroke, filled with color, and with a Tooltip of the text from Label cqu0l
    currCustomers - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Customer array for customers being served right now
    currCustomers - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Customer array of the current customers
    currDay - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    integer representation of which day it is

    currTaskList - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Ticket array of the current tickets
    currTickets - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Ticket array for Tickets being fulfilled right now

    Customer defines the required behaviors for all customer types in the game.
